text:
Kitokattamu (キトカッタム, Kitokattamu) is a Royal Bodyguard for Prince Tubeppa. Jump Ryu! Vol. 21 - Togashi's notes 

Trivia

Kitokattamu's name, affiliation, and occupation were revealed in one of the characters sheets shown during Togashi's interview for Jump Ryu! Vol. 21.
